MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Dismissal - No Appearance

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-31-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Responses By Plaintiff To (1) Form Interrogatories; (2) Special Interrogatories And (3) Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian Ceballo, of Office the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Responses By Plaintiff To (1) Form Interrogatories; (2) Special Interrogatories And (3) Request For Production Of Documents is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Nikolaus W. Reed's Motion to Be Relieved as COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TAZMA ANAYA is granted. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)
